libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generate coverage against APIs present in pekko-actor_2.13 2.0.0-M1, such as classic ActorSystem/Props, configuration, serialization, DNS/settings, and utility classes. Do not use the removed deprecated classic TypedActor/TypedProps APIs from 1.1.x; adding pekko-actor-typed_2.13 would not restore org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor because the modern typed API lives under org.apache.pekko.actor.typed and is a separate artifact.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests reference org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps, which are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor jar and will continue to fail compilation if reused unchanged.

Pekko 2.0.0-M1 release notes say deprecated code was removed and Java 17 is the minimum, so tests should be regenerated or adjusted against the 2.0.0-M1 public API rather than patched with extra setup.

If tests intentionally exercise JavaSerializer, they must configure the ActorSystem with pekko.actor.allow-java-serialization = on in test code; this is feature-specific test configuration, not global deterministic setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required to reach meaningful coverage for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; the resolved artifact is self-contained apart from its normal transitive scala-library and typesafe-config dependencies.
